__schema22.description: A map of server variables for URL template substitution.

__schema24.description: A server variable for URL template substitution. Use {variableName} in the server URL.

__schema25.description: An enumeration of valid string values for this variable.

__schema33.description: Describes the operations available on a single path.

__schema118.description: Number precision format. Use 'float' for 32-bit single-precision or 'double' (default) for 64-bit double-precision IEEE 754.

__schema119.title: multipleOf

__schema125.description: When true, the minimum value is exclusive (value must be > minimum).

__schema127.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema127.description: When true, the maximum value is exclusive (value must be < maximum).

__schema950.title: writeOnly

__schema986.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema988.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema988.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema1039.title: anyOf

__schema1041.title: oneOf
__schema1041.description: Require the instance to validate against exactly one subschema.

__schema1043.title: not
__schema1043.description: Require the instance to NOT validate against the given subschema.

__schema1045.title: if
__schema1045.description: Conditional validation: if the instance matches this schema, apply then; otherwise apply else.

__schema1049.description: Subschema applied when if does not match.
